description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows_x64 that runs on push to the master branch and on opened or synchronized pull requests. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository with full history, installs required build tools, prepares the environment with a custom script, caches the CMake build folder, configures CMake with a specific toolchain, builds the project in parallel, and uploads the resulting package as an artifact if not in an Actions test environment.
